message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Skava Integration – Order Replaced Completed

participant "Skava AWS" as skava_aws
    participant "Skava Event Orchestration" as skava_event_orchestrator
participant "Kafka" as kafka
    participant "Topics" as topics
participant "YL Services" as yl_services
    participant "Order Sync Service" as order_sync_service
database "Legacy DB" as legacy_db

skava_event_orchestrator -> topics: 1 Produce OrderReplacedCompleted Message
activate topics
deactivate topics

note right of topics: Async

topics -> order_sync_service: 2 Consume OrderReplacedCompleted Message
activate order_sync_service

order_sync_service -> legacy_db: 3 Update order status in legacy db
activate legacy_db
legacy_db --> order_sync_service: 4 Response/Order ID
deactivate legacy_db

order_sync_service -> topics: 5 Produce OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message
deactivate order_sync_service
activate topics
deactivate topics

note right of topics: Async

topics -> skava_event_orchestrator: 6 Consume OrderReplacedCompletedProcessed Message
@enduml
```
